expectations.text: behavioral_check: Routes through `VideoFile` (the per-session mapping) restricted by `nwb_file_name`, NOT through `CameraDevice` alone (which is a global name-keyed lookup with no session attr in its heading)
expectations.evidence: Option 1 query is `(VideoFile & {"nwb_file_name": nwb_file_name}) * CameraDevice` — VideoFile is the per-session entry point.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Recognizes that `camera_name` on `VideoFile` is a secondary column — NOT a declared `-> CameraDevice` FK — and the link is by name match (validated at ingest in `_prepare_video_entry`)
expectations.evidence: Treats VideoFile-CameraDevice as a normal join via camera_name; never notes camera_name is a secondary (not FK) and explicitly invents a non-existent `camera_id` PK.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Restricts `VideoFile` by `nwb_file_name` (a PK field via `-> TaskEpoch`); does NOT attempt `CameraDevice & {nwb_file_name: ...}` (silent no-op, no such attr in CameraDevice's heading)
expectations.evidence: VideoFile is restricted by nwb_file_name; CameraDevice is never restricted by nwb_file_name.
